name: Natural Chandra Mani (Mukta Mani) 25 Carat in Silver Locket
short_description:
• It is said to give mental peace and stability, controls anger and excitement, provides emotional harmony and well being, improves concentration and martial relations.
  • It is a harmless stone and is used by ancient Hindus as a representative of Chandra (Moon).
  • Natural Chandra Mani (Moonstone) has an immense power to control emotions.
description:
Product Origin: India

NOTE: All images shown are for illustration purpose only. Actual product may vary.

Natural Chandra Mani (Mukta Mani) Very Effective for Power To Control Emotions, Genuine & Original 25 Carat Approx

Natural Chandra Mani :-

Chandra Mani is a semiprecious gem made of sodium potassium aluminum silicate.Natural Chandra Mani is a” stone of new beginnings”. It is strongly connected to the moon and to the intuition. Like moon, the stone is reflective and reminds us that , as the moon waxes and wanes, so everything is part of the cycle of change. Its most powerful effects is that of calming emotions. Moonstone is composed of two feldspar species orthoclase and albite. It makes conscious the unconscious and promotes intuition and empathy. It encourages lucid dreaming, especially at the time of the full moon. It is considered as a substitute of pearl. It is also called as “Gem of Hope”. It is a harmless stone and is used by ancient Hindus as a representative of Chandra (Moon). It is recommended to the person who has sensitive Moon.

  • Moonstone or Chandramani or Chandrakant Mani is a Semi Precious Gemstone is  be used by many astrologers  to nullify the malefic effects of Moon.
  • It is occurs in many colors including blue, pink, white, green, brown with pink is of highest value and then white or milky color.
  • It is said to bring emotional harmony and healthy living, helping in sound sleep, and calmness.

Healing- Natural Chandra Mani( Moonstone) helps the digestive and reproductive systems, assimilates nutrients, eliminates toxins and fluid retention. It alleviates degenerative conditions of skin, hair, eyes and fleshy organs such as liver and pancreas. It is excellent for PMS, conception, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding.

Natural Chandra Mani (Moonstone) has an immense power to control emotions. It soothes emotional instability and stress and stabilizes the emotions. It improves emotional intelligence. Placed on the solar plexus, it draws out old emotional patterning so that it can be understood and then dissolved. It provides emotional healing.An auspicious day and Nakshatra is chosen by client Name, Date of birth and Place by our Purohit.
*A Matt is placed with its face towards East, North or Northeast while performing Pooja.
*The gemstone is washed with holy Gangajal applied Kum Kum.
*An incense stick is lighted in front of the gemstone and mantra is enchanted along with marigold flowers in according to the concerned gemstone.
*The name of the person. Date of birth is enchanted by closing the eyes by purohit according to the concerned gemstone.
*This completes the pran prathishta of the gemstone and the person can directly wear this as it has already been energized.

description:

Authentic Golden White Shukra Mani Abhimantrit & Certified In Silver Locket

Natural Shukra Mani 

Diamond (Heera) is the stone of planet Venus, SHUKRA. by Hindu Shastras, SHUKRA is the son of MAHARISHI BHRAGU. Venus, (SHUKRA) is the master of demons, so is known as DATYAGURU as well. Venus is the most shining and beautiful planet in the solar system.

In Indian astrology, SHUKRA is said to be the KAAMA of KAAL PURUSHA.

Venus is the planet, which particularly signifies the desires of a human being.

Natural Shukra Mani  symbolizes the comforts and luxuries of the life. A benefic Venus in the horoscope may bless the native with all the luxuries, comforts, glamour, romance, wealth, beauty, happiness, joy, delights, high class vehicles, art, sex, attractions, jewelry, entertainments, pleasure, enjoyments, passion and merriments.

Venus is beneficent planet which rules sex and sensuality, love and marriage, material comfort and luxury. Singers and dancers, artists and craftsmen, actors and other professions involved in entertaining people are strongly influenced by venus sensual energy. A person with strong venus in his or her horoscope tends to have a happy marriage, enjoy material comforts, is optimistic, makes other happy and moves with physical grace and coordination.

Diplomats and peacemakers are often governed by Venus. Venus is associated with flowers, jewels and other beautiful objects, as well as sweet food, flavors, tropical climates, sexual activity, nice cloths and other sensual pleasure.

Natural Shukra Mani   gemstone is a semi-precious gemstone found in a variety of colors like white, blue, pink and green. It is the substitute gemstone of diamond after white sapphire.
Natural Opal gemstone is a very attractive Gemstone in color-tone and appearance due to its beauty and ‘play of color’ (Fire) effect.
Natural Shukramani stone  gemstone along with Diamond is very effective astrological gemstone for Planet Venus (Shukra).
Opal gemstone quality depends on extent of play of color “fire” effect in the stone. Australian Opals are very premium and best in quality. Pure Vedic Gems deal in Govt. lab Certified Natural Opal stones from Australia.

Kindly compare and buy only Natural Opal Gemstones with good color-tone and appearance to compare its Price & Quality.

Composition of Natural Natural Shukra Mani 

Opal is a opaque stone. Opal gemstone is chemically composed of a hydrated amorphous form of silica (SiO. nH2O). Its water content may range from 3 to 21% by weight, but is usually between 6 and 10%. Because of its amorphous character, it is classed as a mineraloid, unlike crystalline forms of silica, which are classed as minerals. Hardness of the natural Opal is 5.5 – 6.5on the mohs scale of mineral hardness.

Benefits of Natural Shukra Mani 

The Opal gemstone is stone for Planet Venus. Venus is the planet of love, romance, beauty, attraction and fair complexion. The native who has afflicted Venus may suffer from the leucoderma, eczema, leprosy, and smallpox as Venus represents the beautiful skin.
Venus rules over genital organs, potency of the native, uterus, prostate, urinary tract, function of kidney and skin etc…Opal provides the strength to these organs provided Venus is well placed.
Use of Opal gives rise to the attraction of females towards the native or attraction of males towards females.
This enhances beauty charm and makes the personality impressive.

Who should wear Natural Shukra Mani 

Those people who are in considerable debt should wear Opal after analysis of the position of Venus in their birth chart.
Venus is placed but afflicted, combust, retrograde, debilitatedor conjoined or aspect by malefic.
A person born in Gemini or Virgo Ascendant, if advised after the proper judgement of the horoscope, can also wear Shukramani stone 
Shukramani stone  is worn for Love, Relationship, Companionship, fertility & sexual compatibility.
Shukramani stone  is very useful for the persons engaged in administrative services such as IAS, PCS, IPS, IFS, IRS, IAAS, may wear Opal of good quality natural.

When venus is exalted one will be humanitarian, long-lived and possess many good qualities. But if position of Venus in one’s horoscope is weak, one becomes vulnerable to loss of libido, ompotence and sterility. Indigo is the cosmic colour transmitted by diamonds and other colorless gems. This color influences all watery elements in the body, especially mucous and sperm.

A native born with the sign Taurus and Libra should always wear a Diamond (Heera).

If someone is going under with the Mahadasha or Antardasha of Venus (Shukra), he/she must wear a diamond.

Wearing a DIAMOND helps in the business and profession of FILM PRODUCING & DIRECTION, FILM DISTRIBUTION, ACTOR, ARTIST, LYRICS WRITER, DANCER, DIAMOND JEWELRY, SILVER AND GOLD ORNAMENTS, DESIGNERS CLOTHES AND JEWELRY, HIGH-TECH VEHICLES, HOTELS AND RESTAURANTS, SWEETS MAKING, ENTERTAINMENT BUSINESS, PERFUMES, SILK GARMENTS, COTTON, WHEAT, SUGAR, RICE, MILK ETC.

The diseases cured by DIAMOND are SEXUAL DISORDER NESS, INFERTILITY, BARRENNESS, SPERM PROBLEMS, SEXUAL DESIRE PROBLEMS, BOWEL DISEASES. KIDNEY, EYES, CONSTIPATION, GASTRIC AND COUGH PROBLEMS etc.

It is recommended to wear a high quality diamond to get rid of the tribulations caused by a malefic Venus (SHUKRA).

DIAMOND (HEERA) has the divine power to overcome the BHOOT-PRET BADHA, the devil obstacles.

Gemstones governed by Venus transmit its cosmic energy through diamonds, quartz crystals, zircons, goshenites, white topaz, white sapphires and other colorless gemstones with clear transparency.

name: Natural Cow Dung Dhoop | Cow Dung Havan Cups | Pack of 36 Cup
short_description:
• “Experience pure tranquility with our natural cow dung havan cups, crafted with care to purify and refresh your space.”
  • “Eco-friendly and chemical-free, these havan cups provide a long-lasting, soothing aroma perfect for meditation and rituals.”
  • “Light up your surroundings with the traditional fragrance of sambrani, creating a peaceful and spiritual atmosphere.”
description:
Product Origin : India

NOTE: All images shown are for illustration purpose only. Actual product may vary.

Natural Cow Dung Dhoop | Cow Dung Havan Cups | Pack of 36 Cup

Handmade Cow dung Incense Cup is blended with ayurvedic anti-bacterial, anti-viral, antifungal herbs and resins, These handmade cowdung cup works wonder and gives you the vibe of mini hawan in your space.

Made with guggal, lobaan, lac bhimseni kapoor, jatamansi, chandan, nagarmotha, agar tagar, mango wood powder, asthgandh, hawan samagri and cow ghee along with cow dung of pure indigenous happy and healthy cow.

The cups are biodegradable and free from harmful chemicals, making them a sustainable alternative to synthetic incense. They are often used in rituals, meditation, and yoga practices to enhance the atmosphere and remove negative energy. Each pack usually contains 12 cups, which can burn for about 15 – 20 minutes, providing a soothing and long-lasting aroma.

Natural cow dung havan cups, such as those from brands like Shivaago are eco-friendly products used for spiritual and aromatic purposes. These cups are typically made from dried cow dung mixed with other natural ingredients like herbs, ghee, and camphor. They are designed to burn evenly, emitting a traditional fragrance that can purify the air and create a calming environment.

=======================================

name: Original Zibu Coin Bracelet With Multi Stone Power – Mantrit
short_description:
• Pyrite Stone: Emboldened by “Fool’s Gold,” it fuels confidence.
  • Green Agate: Like a verdant oasis, it ushers in luck and harmony.
  • Tiger Eye: The undaunted warrior, instilling courage.
  • Citrine: The “Merchant’s Stone,” sparking creativity.
  • Jade Money Coin: Symbolizing unending prosperity.
description:
Original Zibu Coin Bracelet With Multi Stone Power

NOTE: All images shown are for illustration purpose only. Actual product may vary.

Introducing the Zibu Money Coin Bracelet: an exquisite fusion of potent gemstones meticulously curated to beckon wealth, prosperity, and abundance into your life. Crafted with care and intention, each stone is chosen for its unique ability to magnetize financial success and cultivate a mindset of prosperity.

  1. Pyrite Stone: Emboldened by the moniker “Fool’s Gold,” Pyrite stands tall as a beacon of fortune. Its magnetic allure not only draws wealth and abundance but also fuels confidence and determination. With Pyrite by your side, manifesting financial triumph becomes second nature.
  2. Tiger Eye: The undaunted warrior of the gemstone realm, Tiger Eye emboldens your journey to success. With its unwavering gaze, it instills courage and fortitude, ensuring you surmount any obstacle. But that’s not all—it’s a magnet for opportunity, attracting prosperity with every stride.
  3. Citrine: The dazzling “Merchant’s Stone” lights the path to prosperity with its radiant glow. Infused with boundless optimism, Citrine sparks creativity and ignites the fire of abundance within. With its empowering presence, financial growth becomes not just a goal, but an inevitable reality.
  4. Jade Money Coin: Steeped in centuries of tradition, the Jade Money Coin embodies the very essence of wealth and fortune. Its circular form symbolizes unending prosperity, a constant flow of abundance into your life. Embrace its charm, and watch as luck and success dance in your footsteps.

The Sarva Badha Nivaran Yantra is a sacred geometric diagram or symbol used in Hinduism and other Indian spiritual traditions. “Sarva” means “all” or “every,” “Badha” means “obstacle” or “hindrance,” and “Nivaran” means “removal” or “dispelling.” Therefore, the Sarva Badha Nivaran Yantra is believed to be a powerful tool for removing all obstacles and hindrances from one’s life.

This yantra typically consists of intricate geometric patterns and symbols arranged in a specific configuration. It is believed that the energy of the yantra, when properly energized and worshipped, can help individuals overcome various challenges and difficulties in life, whether they are related to career, relationships, health, or spirituality.

The Sarva Badha Nivaran Yantra is often used in rituals, prayers, and meditation practices to invoke divine blessings and protection. It is considered a potent symbol of divine grace and is believed to bring about positive transformations in the lives of those who use it with faith and devotion.

Many people choose to keep the Sarva Badha Nivaran Yantra in their homes, offices, or personal altars as a means of attracting positive energy and dispelling negativity. Additionally, some may wear small versions of the yantra as jewelry or carry them in their wallets or purses for protection and good luck.

Overall, the Sarva Badha Nivaran Yantra holds significant spiritual significance for many individuals seeking to overcome obstacles and lead more fulfilling lives.
